name: Food Processor Carob Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together carob, flour, salt and baking powder.
2. In the food processor, cream eggs, honey and vanilla.
3. Add dry ingredients to the food processor, plus butter and walnuts.
4. Pour mixture into a greased 9x9 pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
